author: @boltdotnew
text: Today vibe coding goes pro. Introducing Bolt v2: World's best agents (Claude Code, Codex), built in backend. Now anyone can build without boundaries.

author: @levelsio
text: Day 5 of the Cursor #vibejam — Cursor 3 is a completely rebuilt interface designed around agents, run multiple AI agents in parallel.

author: @boringmarketer
text: What I've learned about vibe coding in Cursor over 4 weeks — a connected environment where you go from INSIGHT → ACTION is incredibly powerful.

author: @houstongolden
text: Heavy daily vibe coder rank: 1. Bolt 2. Cursor 3. Lovable. Workflow: build MVP in Bolt → move to Cursor with Claude Code in terminal.

author: @bcherny
text: I'm Boris and I created Claude Code. Lots of people asked how I use it — my setup is surprisingly vanilla. It works great out of the box.

author: @PrajwalTomar_
text: The loop that makes vibe coding work: load project context, pick a feature, ask for approaches first — not code. Then let it build.

author: @code_rams
text: This 30-min video will change how you build with Claude forever. Vibe Coding is real — talk to Claude like a senior dev who knows your project.

author: @paoloanzn
text: Claude Code wrappers are going to be the Cursor of 2026. Letting AI control its own environment instead of copy pasting context is fundamentally better.
